Headline: #73 Armitage Temporary Reroute at Armitage/Sheffield
ShortDescription: #73 Armitage buses are temp. rerouted in both directions via Armitage, Halsted, Fullerton, Sheffield and Armitage due to construction near Armitage/Sheffield.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

#73 Armitage buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Armitage, Halsted, Fullerton, Sheffield, then resume their normal route on Armitage.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to construction near Armitage/Sheffield.

Headline: Temporary Reroute at Cermak/Ashland
ShortDescription: #60 Blue Island, #21 Cermak and #18 16th/18th buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions due to a marathon/race near Cermak/Ashland.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

#60 Blue Island, #21 Cermak and #18 16th/18th buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions as follows:

#60 Blue Island buses will operate via Blue Island, Ashland, Roosevelt, Racine, then resume their normal route.

#21 Cermak buses will operate via Cermak, Ashland, Roosevelt, Halsted, then resume their normal route on Cermak.

#18 16th/18th buses will operate:

  • Eastbound via 18th, Ashland, Roosevelt, Halsted and 18th, then resume their normal route.
  • Westbound via Roosevelt, Halsted and 18th, then resume their normal route.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to a marathon/race near Cermak/Ashland.

Headline: #79 79th Temporary Reroute at 79th/Commercial
ShortDescription: 79 79th buses are temp. rerouted in both directions via 79th, Exchange, 83rd, South Shore, 79th & over normal route, due to street blockage near 79th/Commercial

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#79 79th buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via 79th, Exchange, 83rd, South Shore, 79th and over normal route, due to street blockage near 79th/Commercial.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #4 Cottage Grove and #115 Pullman/115th Temporary Southbound Reroute near 95th/Cottage Grove
ShortDescription: Southbound #4 Cottage Grove and #115 Pullman/115th buses are temporarily rerouted near 95th/Cottage Grove due to street blockage.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Southbound #4 Cottage Grove and #115 Pullman/115th buses are temporarily rerouted near 95th/Cottage Grove due to street blockage.

#4 Cottage Grove buses will operate via Cottage Grove, 95th, King Drive,100th, and Cottage Grove, over to normal route.

#115 Pullman/115th buses will operate via 95th, King Drive, 100th, and Cottage Grove, over to normal route

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: Temporary Reroute
ShortDescription: NB J14 and 56, and WB 20, 60 and 124 buses will operate via Madison, Franklin, Randolph, and Clinton; J14, 20, 56 via Madison. 60, 124 via Clinton.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?
Northbound #J14 Jeffery Jump and #56 Milwaukee, and westbound #20 Madison, #60 Blue Island/26th and #124 Navy Pier buses will operate via Madison, Franklin, Randolph, and Clinton.

#J14, #20 and #56 buses will resume their normal route on Madison.

#60 and #124 buses will resume their normal route on Clinton. 

Allow extra travel time. 

Why is service being changed?
Buses are rerouted due to a helicopter lift.

Headline: #8 Halsted Temporary Southbound Reroute near Halsted/Cermak
ShortDescription: Southbound #8 Halsted buses are temporarily rerouted via  Halsted, Cermak, Canal, Archer and over regular route, due to street blockage near Halsted/Cermak.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Southbound #8 Halsted buses are temporarily rerouted via  Halsted, Cermak, Canal, Archer and over regular route, due to street blockage near Halsted/Cermak.

Northbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.
